introSection: Ocean Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Harbour Park in Littlehampton, West Sussex, England, UK.
fullText:
Ocean Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Harbour Park in Littlehampton, West Sussex, England, UK.

Yellow track and silver supports.
